goals: Calculate future value of research grant investment over time
Compare future values across multiple interest rate scenarios
Calculate discount pricing for research equipment purchase
Launch interactive web UI for detailed financial analysis

user_agent_config.personality: Analytical and methodical, approaches financial calculations with research-oriented curiosity. Prefers structured comparisons and clear numerical results.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Competent researcher who understands basic financial concepts but does not know specific tool names or internal APIs. Can follow instructions for calculations and interpret results.

end_condition: The user has completed all financial calculations and launched the web UI for further exploration.
